sources.label: Borskollen - LumenRadio aktie nyheter (Q1 2026 report, insider buys, SEK 500M 2030 target)

verdicts.rankRationale: No material news since June 6; today's -3.0% (67 to 65 SEK) is sub-threshold micro-cap noise on an illiquid First North name, not new evidence either way. Yesterday's verdict was hold and nothing has changed the scaling-page setup, so rank 33 stands.
verdicts.bull: Q1 2026 showed EBIT inflecting (SEK 6.5M vs 2.1M) with Building Automation up 53.6%, and CEO/chairman insider buys plus the SEK 500M-by-2030 target signal management conviction in an under-owned $90M industrial-wireless niche.
verdicts.neutral: A +14% YTD with no fresh catalysts since the Q1 print leaves the name in drift; the modest pullback marginally improves entry but is too small to change residual alpha on this page.
verdicts.bear: Top-line growth ex-Building Automation is slow (+4% group), the entertainment-lighting legacy is cyclical, and a $90M cap with thin liquidity means rerating depends on catalysts that may not arrive for quarters.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Q2 2026 report confirming Building Automation momentum and continued EBIT margin expansion, or a new design win/OEM module contract.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Micro-cap illiquidity and slow group revenue growth; any Building Automation deceleration would undercut the SEK 500M 2030 target narrative.
